# HPD.ML.Transforms.MeanVarianceNormalizeTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Transforms` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Kind: `class`

Normalizes to zero mean and unit variance (z-score normalization). Formula: (value - mean) / stddev

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class MeanVarianceNormalizeTransform : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```
